common.openGraphTitle: Dexter — autonomous AI agent for financial research
common.openGraphDescription: Dexter decomposes complex questions, fetches live market data, validates its own work, and produces citation-backed answers.

hero.title: Deep financial research,
hero.subtitle: Dexter decomposes complex questions, fetches live market data, validates its own work, and produces citation-backed answers. The same agent core powers the terminal CLI, WhatsApp, and the web — wherever you do research.

reasoning.title: Plans, executes, self-validates
reasoning.body: Dexter breaks down a question into a research plan, runs tools concurrently, and revisits its own answer until it is grounded in real data.

liveData.title: Direct market & filings access
liveData.body: Real-time prices, fundamentals, ratios and news through Financial Datasets, plus web search and document tooling — no stale snapshots.

memory.title: Remembers your thesis
memory.body: Long-term memory is held in MemoryLake. Dexter recalls your prior positions, preferences, and rules every turn so the analysis stays personal.

samples.title: Ask anything you would ask a junior analyst.
samples.quickDcf: Run a quick DCF on NVDA using the latest 10-Q.
samples.comparable: Compare AAPL and MSFT cash flow trends over the last 5 years.
samples.macro: What does the latest CPI print mean for the 10Y?
samples.thesis: Summarize the bull and bear thesis for TSMC right now.

composer.footer: DEXTER · For research only — not investment advice.

empty.title: What would you like to research?
empty.subtitle: Ask anything you would hand to a junior analyst. Dexter plans, fetches live data, and shows its work.

quickDcf.label: Quick DCF
quickDcf.prompt: Run a quick DCF on NVDA using the latest 10-Q. Show me your assumptions.

comparable.label: Comparable
comparable.prompt: Compare AAPL and MSFT cash flow trends over the last 5 years.

macro.label: Macro
macro.prompt: What does the latest CPI print mean for the 10-year Treasury yield?

thesis.label: Thesis
thesis.prompt: Summarize the current bull and bear thesis for TSMC.

portfolios.title: Portfolios
portfolios.subtitle: Manage your watchlists.
portfolios.holdingsEmpty: No holdings yet. Add one above.
portfolios.searchPlaceholder: Search ticker or name (English, pinyin, 中文)
portfolios.emptyHint: Create your first portfolio to start tracking technical indicators.
portfolios.errNameTooLong: Name must be 80 characters or fewer.
portfolios.errNameTaken: A portfolio with that name already exists.
portfolios.errMaxPortfolios: You've reached the maximum number of portfolios.
portfolios.errTickerExists: That ticker is already in this portfolio.
portfolios.errInvalidWeight: Weight must be a number between 0 and 999.

indicators.title: Indicators
indicators.subtitle: Technical signals across your watchlist.
indicators.emptyHint: Tell Dexter your holdings — e.g. NVDA, TSLA, 0700.HK — and pick "Save to memory" so you only do this once.
indicators.emptyAfterClear: Add at least one ticker to view this indicator.
indicators.emptyNoPortfoliosHint: Indicators run against your portfolios. Add one to get started.
indicators.emptyPortfolio: This portfolio has no holdings yet.
indicators.emptyPortfolioHint: Add a few tickers to see indicators.

memory.title: Memory
memory.subtitle: What Dexter remembers about you. Forget anything you'd rather it not keep.
memory.empty: No memories yet. Dexter will save things here as you research.
memory.notConfigured: MemoryLake is not configured. Set MEMORYLAKE_API_KEY in env to enable.
memory.errorLoading: Could not load memories. Please try again.

auth.signInSubtitle: Pick up your research where you left off.
auth.codeSubtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to {email}. It expires in 10 minutes.
auth.terms: By continuing you agree to use Dexter for research only. Not investment advice.
auth.devCodeBanner: SMTP not configured — code shown for testing:

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.throttled: Please wait a moment before requesting another code.
errors.invalidCode: That code is not valid. Try again or resend.
errors.expiredCode: That code has expired. Send a new one.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
